name: Google AI Overview Cleaner
author: Austin Laubach
description: Appends -ai to Google searches to filter out AI results. Ignores searches that already include 'ai' within, to prevent empty results. This is a fork of the addon 'AIPurge' by Matt Anderson. Credits to him for the original source code. The purpose of the fork is to add functionality to avoid 'zero-result' searches when a query originally includes the 'ai' string.
